# P-H-002 — Disbursement dated before authorising amendment

> Décaissement antérieur à son avenant

## Description (EN)

Treasury disbursement is dated before the amendment that legally authorised it.

## Description (FR)

Le mandat de paiement est daté avant l'avenant qui en constitue le fondement légal.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Amendment out of sequence — an amendment effective_date precedes the contract's award_date, OR amendments are out-of-temporal-order in the timeline.

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Default prior 0.40 + weight 0.85.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Backdated amendments for clerical reasons** (e.g. retroactive scope addition formalised after the fact).

## Production wiring

Requires multiple `amendment` events with parseable `effective_date` for the same contract.
